title: PatchProposal
description: Produced by the Developer in response to a StoryContract. One structural change only. The Developer cannot self-certify completion — the Validator decides.

contract_id.description: Must match the contract that triggered this proposal

summary.description: One paragraph: what changed and the single reason why

change_type.description: GRASP repair operator (or new_impl for greenfield). One type per proposal — never bundle.

changed_files.description: All files touched. Must be a subset of allowed_write_set.

patch_branch.description: Workspace/story branch; never the main branch

patch_diff_path.description: Optional: path to a .diff or .patch artifact

postconditions_claimed.description: Acceptance criteria this proposal claims to meet. The Validator verifies — do NOT mark the story done here.

validation_commands_run.description: Validation commands the Developer ran locally before proposing

failure_gene.description: If this is a Debugger repair, include the gene here. Null for normal Developer proposals.
